cancelWithdrawal(uint256).details: Cancels a pending withdrawal request before epoch processing

params.requestId: ID of the withdrawal request to cancel

claimWithdrawal(uint256,uint256).details: Claims fulfilled withdrawal amount for a processed request

params.amount: Amount to claim (unused parameter, claims full fulfilled amount)
params.requestId: ID of the withdrawal request to claim

constructor.details: Constructor that disables initializers for implementation contract

getCurrentEpoch().details: Returns the current active epoch number

returns._0: Current epoch number (or next if current has ended)

getEpoch(uint256).details: Returns details of a specific epoch

getEpochRequests(uint256).details: Returns all withdrawal request IDs for a specific epoch

returns._0: Array of request IDs in the epoch

getLenderRequests(address).details: Returns all withdrawal request IDs for a specific lender

returns._0: Array of request IDs belonging to the lender

getWithdrawalRequest(uint256).details: Returns details of a specific withdrawal request

initialize(address,address,address).details: Initializes the contract (replaces constructor for upgradeable pattern)

isWithdrawalReady(uint256).details: Checks if a withdrawal request is ready to be claimed

returns._0: True if request is processed, unclaimed, and has positive fulfilled amount

processEpoch(uint256,uint256).details: Processes an epoch by allocating available liquidity to withdrawal requests

params.availableLiquidity: Total liquidity available for fulfilling withdrawal requests

requestWithdrawal(address,uint256,uint25.details: Requests a withdrawal for a lender from a specific position

params.lender: Address of the lender requesting withdrawal
params.positionId: ID of the position to withdraw from

returns.requestId: Unique identifier for the withdrawal request

timeUntilEpochEnd().details: Returns time remaining until current epoch ends

returns._0: Seconds remaining, or 0 if epoch has ended
